CREATE TABLE test_reinterpret (value UInt32, dateValue Date, dateTimeValue DateTime);
SELECT reinterpretAsString((SELECT value FROM test_reinterpret WHERE value = 255)) AS result FROM test_reinterpret;
SELECT reinterpretAsString(value) || ' supplemental' FROM test_reinterpret WHERE dateValue < '1970-03-08';
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id UInt32, description String);
INSERT INTO additional_data VALUES (1, 'first entry'), (2, 'second entry');
SELECT reinterpretAsString(test.value) FROM test_reinterpret AS test JOIN additional_data AS ad ON test.value = ad.id WHERE ad.id = 1;
WITH (SELECT reinterpretAsString(value) FROM test_reinterpret) AS subquery SELECT * FROM subquery;
